---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for CapNet
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? What's the use case?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature or change you'd like to see.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought about.

## Additional Context

Any other information — mockups, protocol references, related issues.
